title: Haokai Star Rail Blade ReNeo
description: The ReNeo mod of Haokai Star Rail Blade
body:
**Use MCreator to create this mod**

# 🌏中文介绍
此模组添加了许多强力的武器，除“彩虹”系列神器外，所有武器都以游戏《崩坏·星穹铁道》里的角色作为武器纹理        部分武器:
 - 彩虹：模组中第三强的武器（前两个暂未完成）
 - 大地：拥有超高防御
 - 天空：飞行
 - 岁月：暂停时间

# 🌏English Description
This mod has added many powerful weapons, except for the "Rainbow" series artifact, all weapons use characters from the game "Collapse: Star Dome Railway" as weapon textures
 - Rainbow: The third strongest weapon in the mod (the first two are not yet completed)
 - Earth: with ultra-high defense
 - Sky:Flight
 - Time: Pause Time
